diagrams.title: ALTER TABLE Operations Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows different categories of ALTER TABLE operations: Column Operations, Constraint Operations, and Table Operations
diagrams.purpose: Understand the breadth of schema modification capabilities

diagrams.title: DROP vs TRUNCATE vs DELETE Flowchart
diagrams.description: Decision tree showing when to use each command based on whether you want to keep structure, data, or have rollback capability
diagrams.purpose: Choose the right operation for different scenarios

diagrams.title: Constraint Dependency Chain
diagrams.description: Shows how foreign key constraints create dependencies between tables affecting schema changes
elements: DROP FK before dropping referenced column
diagrams.purpose: Understand constraint dependencies before schema changes
